section.heading: Authorization of appropriations

subsection.heading: Gallaudet University
subsection.chapeau: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2009 through 2014 to carry out the provisions of subchapter I and this subchapter, relating to—

paragraph.content: the Model Secondary School for the Deaf.

subsection.heading: National Technical Institute for the Deaf

content.p: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2009 through 2014 to carry out the provisions of subchapter I and this subchapter relating to the National Technical Institute for the Deaf.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 99–371, title II, § 212, as added Pub. L. 105–244, title IX, § 925, Oct. 7, 1998, 112 Stat. 1833; amended Pub. L. 110–315, title IX, § 914, Aug. 14, 2008, 122 Stat. 3455.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to this section were contained in section 4360 of this title, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 105–244.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2008—Subsec. (a). Pub. L. 110–315, § 914(1), substituted “fiscal years 2009 through 2014” for “fiscal years 1998 through 2003” in introductory provisions.
Subsec. (b). Pub. L. 110–315, § 914(2), substituted “fiscal years 2009 through 2014” for “fiscal years 1998 through 2003”.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Oct. 1, 1998, except as otherwise provided in Pub. L. 105–244, see section 3 of Pub. L. 105–244, set out as an Effective Date of 1998 Amendment note under section 1001 of this title.
